projects.name: This Portfolio Site
projects.role: Built it myself, full stack and AI assistant
projects.summary: The site you are looking at right now. A personal portfolio built around a live AI assistant that knows my real work.
projects.description: This is the site you are looking at. I built it from scratch as a portfolio that does not feel like a static About Me page. A live AI assistant (the chat on the right) answers visitor questions using my actual repos and bio as context. The site is dark, deep indigo black with warm amber for the human side and cool violet for the AI side. Fraunces serif for headlines, JetBrains Mono for labels, Inter for body. The hero has a slowly drifting topographic line pattern. There is also an admin dashboard at /admin where I can see what the agent has been doing.
